entries.name: The Crossing — ~8 million New Yorkers torn into Hethrun in one black second; what did it, and is there a way home?
Find your people — brother Akhil and the ~50, scattered across a realm at war; finding them needs a city, news, and leverage

KNOWN drift-marked — the secret is OUT. Shake owned it to his men, but it COST him (Fate No): Hethrun's 'drift-tainted' prejudice bit — muttering, a couple of desertions, his moral authority dented at the worst hour; only Eadwig's public vouching holds the crack. The web & hostile Crown know what he is (a thing to own/break/kill). Standing/morale now an open problem to manage

Sworn man of Count Edmund — fealty given; BUT Shake now means to hold Marlford in his OWN name (free Aldwin & keep his word, yet build a personal seat); his oath, the relief-cause, and his ambition now pull three ways

The line cut down — Edmund stricken, Wystan murdered, & now the knives came for EADGYTH too (saved by Godric/Samosa); Aldwin the last male of the blood holds besieged Hollowford on Shake's promise — both surviving children are marked; relief must come before the keep falls

THE RELIEF RIDE (spine) — break the Ash-Captain's siege of Hollowford. The COALITION COLLAPSED: Beorhtric/Stanmere gone, Goldmead refused, the Crown turned hostile, Halfdan silent — Shake stands ALONE with a sharp picked core (300 foot + 40 lances) & a melting host. The 'wait for plague to rot the enemy' plan FAILED (the besiegers are web-supplied & near full strength, massing to STORM the keep). Supply near-spent: march within days or lose the army — a desperate, outnumbered relief, alone

The Coronation Reckoning — the Witan summoned to the Kingsmound; the realm settles at MIDWINTER (by vote or the sword behind it). A deadline on everything; riders now sent to the Crown & to Halfdan (Eadgyth's hand NOT promised)

THE HOST IS WON / the muster — Shake holds Marlford & its ~800-1,000 field-host (loyal to HIM personally now) + ~40 lances/Greenways knights + Saewulf's holdouts: the CORE of a real relief army, his to march. Loose end: Cray fled to sell what he knows

The web strikes — blade, blighted grain, betrayal. Assassin (captive), poisoned-grain on Stanmere (Beorhtric vanished), Cray SOLD Shake's road & nature → the marauder-captain's ambush (Oswin killed; captain now CAPTURED & abandoned-bitter). KEY LEVER: the web is SUPPLYING the Ash-Captain (clean grain up his lines while poisoning everyone else) — cut that & the besiegers weaken for real. TWO live web-captives to crack (assassin + captain) + the tally + Cray/the head/the grain-factor still loose. **PC now THEORIZES (council, cui-bono): the web = Bone-Sayer brokers (knives-for-hire, cutouts) whose paymaster is almost certainly EORL RANULF (Ostmark-backed pretender) — the Ash-Captain & the web are ONE proxy campaign; one throat = the grain-line.** Theory, unproven; the captives/Mossdrowen trail can prove it. Trail WEST → Mossdrowen (GM-truth: Ranulf→Greldon→Bone-Sayers, confirmed)
